ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_number" TEXT /* Activity number assigned by the community center */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the activity */,
  "community_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community center where the activity is held */,
  "number_enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of participants currently enrolled */,
  "beginning_date" TEXT /* Date the activity begins */,
  "ending_date" TEXT /* Date the activity ends */,
  "starting_time" TEXT /* Time the activity starts */,
  "ending_time" TEXT /* Time the activity ends */,
  "minimum_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required for participation */,
  "maximum_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age required for participation */,
  "weekdays" TEXT /* Days of the week the activity is held (e.g., M Th) */,
  "number_of_hours" INTEGER /* Total number of hours the activity runs */,
  "number_of_dates" INTEGER /* Total number of dates the activity is held */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the activity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the activity is offered */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor responsible for the activity */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location within the community center */,
  "recurrence_pattern" TEXT /* Recurrence pattern of the activity (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants on the waitlist */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the activity */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Additional eligibility criteria for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_community_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_center_id") REFERENCES community_centers ("community_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_centers" (
  "community_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the community center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the community center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the community center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the community center */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the community center */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the community center (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the participant */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the participant is enrolled in */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Waitlisted, Cancelled) */,
  "waitlist_position" INTEGER /* Position of the participant on the waitlist */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Check) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the record is associated with */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the activity */,
  "expense" REAL /* Expenses incurred for the activity */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial record */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., Enrollment Fee, Late Fee) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Check) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of any refunds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)
